title: The Departmentalisation of Union Accounts (Transfer of Personnel) Act, 1976
full_text: The Departmentalisation of Union Accounts (Transfer of Personnel) Act, 1976 संघ लेखा विभागीकरण (कार्मिक अन्‍तरण) अधिनियम, 1976 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 197676 Act Number: 59 Enactment Date: 1976-04-08 Act Year: 1976 Short Title: The Departmentalisation of Union Accounts (Transfer of Personnel) Act, 1976 Hindi Title: संघ लेखा विभागीकरण (कार्मिक अन्‍तरण) अधिनियम, 1976 Long Title: An Act to provide for the transfer of officers serving in the Indian Audit and Accounts Department to any Ministry, Department or office of the Central Government for facilitating the efficient discharge by such Ministry, Department or office of the responsibility in connection with compiling the accounts thereof. Ministry: Ministry of Finance Department: Department of Expenditure Enforcement Date: 01-03-1976 Last Updated: 01-04-2019 TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles The Departmentalisation of Union Accounts (Transfer of Personnel) Act, 1976 Show all section Section 1. Short title and commencement. Section 2. Transfer of officers and employees of the Indian Audit and Accounts Department. Section 3. Repeal and saving.
